notes.current_kg_issue: The KG currently contains MBID 6fbe9563-4c92-41dc-bdbc-63480427a58e which belongs to 'UMM', an electronic music project — completely wrong artist. All triples under this URI (type, label, 1 release) belong to the wrong entity and should be replaced.
notes.cultural_significance: Known as 'Star of the East' and 'Planet of the East'. Her funeral in 1975 drew an estimated 4 million mourners — one of the largest funerals in history. She remains the best-selling Middle Eastern singer of all time. Her Thursday evening radio concerts were a national institution for over 30 years, stopping traffic across the Arab world.
